{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sola's handheld cannon
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola's handheld cannon]] releases red-orange energy that can destroy worlds.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
